response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed video for song title and artist: on-screen text showed "Bunny Girl" and "Lyrics, Music: AKASAKI". 
2. Performed web search for "Bunny Girl AKASAKI Japanese and English lyrics".
3. Found relevant lyrics from Genius and Lyrical Nonsense search results.
4. Mapped scenes based on the song performance and subsequent dialogue section. The music starts at 00:04 and finishes as the scene transitions to dialogue around 03:41.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two anime-style characters performing the song "Bunny Girl" by AKASAKI, followed by dialogue intervals. The main song is presented with on-screen lyrics throughout.

scenes.description: Two characters (Kureiji Ollie and Pavolia Reine) are performing the song 'Bunny Girl' on a stage. Lyrics are shown on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
夜の始まりさ, Bunny Girl
誘惑される鼓動に
弾け飛ぶ葛藤に愛を乾杯
伝えられなくても恋の始まりさ, Bunny Girl
誰かを穿って 澄んだ君の目を
孕んで
(Lyrics repeat throughout the song)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's the beginning of the night, Bunny Girl
I'm tempted by the beating
I'll toast to the conflict that bursts away
Even if I can't convey it, it's the beginning of love, Bunny Girl
Someone is being picked at, even in those clear eyes, I'm pregnant with them
(Lyrics repeat throughout the song)
